summary: Health upgraded to RED. Sprint P0s (#972, #973) are CLOSED — hook deny-reason bug and essentials pack issue both fixed. However: (1) New P0 #1128 — swarm health alert, 78% of agent worktrees stuck/dead (5 of 9 agents). (2) Systemic CI failure — all 6 open PRs are failing test-and-build + lint. This is almost certainly a main-branch break causing all PRs to fail, not individual PR regressions. (3) PR budget exceeded: 6 open vs max 3. No PRs are mergeable this cycle. Sprint goal updated: investigate + fix systemic CI failure, then resume #955 (Go kernel delegation).
